recovery.confirmSaved: I have safely stored the recovery code
recovery.description: Your files are now end-to-end encrypted — not even SyncTheStudio can open them. This code is the only way to regain access to your files after a password reset. Store it somewhere safe (password manager, printed out).
recovery.title: Your recovery code
recovery.unlockDescription: Your password was reset, so your encrypted files are locked. Enter your recovery code to unlock them — afterwards your new password works as usual.
recovery.warning: Without this code your encrypted files are irrecoverably lost after a password reset. It will never be shown again.
recovery.wrongCode: That code is not valid. Please check your input.
